profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Samcro Hyosung Adilestari Tbk manufactures and sells hook and loop fastener tapes in Indonesia and internationally. The company provides webbing tape, elastic, and shoelace products; and adhesive, back to back, cable tie, fire retardant, molded hook, mushroom, pressure sensitive, regular sew-on, strap, and unloopped hook and loop fastener products. Its products are used in apparel, footwear, industrial, medical, and other applications. The company was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.
